ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol (e.g., AXSUSDT) */,
  "index_id" TEXT /* Unique index for the trading data record */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the opening price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the trading pair */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the trading period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the trading pair */,
  "volume" REAL /* Total volume traded during the period */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for the closing price */,
  "quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Total quote asset volume traded during the period */,
  "number_of_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the period */,
  "taker_buy_base_asset_volume" REAL /* Total volume of base asset bought by takers */,
  "taker_buy_quote_asset_volume" REAL /* Total volume of quote asset bought by takers */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the exchange where the trade occurred */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the trading pair at the time of the trade */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume compared to the previous period */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price compared to the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user on the platform */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol (e.g., AXSUSDT) */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the asset traded */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (e.g., buy or sell) */,
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the fees table */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market, limit, stop-loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_fee_id FOREIGN KEY ("fee_id") REFERENCES fees ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol related to the alert */,
  "alert_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, canceled) */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_price" REAL /* Price at which the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for this session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for login */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for login (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the market data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol (e.g., AXSUSDT) */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of the trading pair over a defined period */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume for the trading pair over a defined period */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated timestamp for the market data */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour volume change */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour price change */,
  "high_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES trading_data ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol (e.g., AXSUSDT) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset at the given timestamp */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the historical price entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical price data (e.g., exchange, API) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the historical price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES trading_data ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who incurred the fee */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol */,
  "fee_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of fee charged */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Total fee amount charged for the trade */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade associated with this fee */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fee is charged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fee (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Trading pair symbol */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of trades for the given pair */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "total_volume" REAL /* Total volume traded */,
  "volume_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour volume change */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* 24-hour price change */,
  "high_price_24h" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "low_price_24h" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_metrics_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES trading_data ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "module" TEXT /* Module where the error occurred */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function where the error occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the error, if applicable */,
  "trace_id" TEXT /* Trace ID for tracking the error in logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
